title: Rewrite running_sum/1 as tail-recursive with explicit accumulator
prompt: Refactor `MyApp.ListUtils.running_sum/1` from test_fixtures/non_tail_recursive.ex. The current version is NOT tail-recursive (it calls itself, then inspects the result, then prepends). Rewrite so the recursive call is the last operation — use an accumulator tuple `{carry, acc}` and reverse at the end. The semantics: given `[1, 2, 3]`, return `[1, 3, 6]`. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.ListUtils do ... end` with just running_sum.
tier_rationale: Non-trivial recursion rewrite. Claude typically writes a non-tail version first.
